modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble logging into Lawrence HPC from Windows computer

full_description_text: 
User is trying to log into Lawrence HPC. They are using a Windows computer. They don't know how to do it. Need help with the login process.
short_description: Trouble logging into Lawrence HPC from Windows computer
description: User is trying to log into Lawrence HPC. They are using a Windows computer. They don't know how to do it. Need help with the login process.
